segments: قَالَ عَلِيٌّ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ : "يَدُ اَللَّهِ فَوْقَ رَأْسِ اَلْحَاكِمِ تُرَفْرِفُ بِالرَّحْمَةِ، فَإِذَا حَافَ فِي اَلْحُكْمِ وَكَلَهُ اَللَّهُ عَزَّ وَ جَلَّ إِلَى نَفْسِهِ".
arabic.text: قَالَ عَلِيٌّ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ : "يَدُ اَللَّهِ فَوْقَ رَأْسِ اَلْحَاكِمِ تُرَفْرِفُ بِالرَّحْمَةِ، فَإِذَا حَافَ فِي اَلْحُكْمِ وَكَلَهُ اَللَّهُ عَزَّ وَ جَلَّ إِلَى نَفْسِهِ".

segments:
Hadith.3228 - Al-Sakuni narrated with his chain of transmission that Commander of the Faithful Imam Ali ibn Abi Talib (as) said:
"The hand of Allah (swt) hovers with mercy above the head of the judge. But if he deviates in judgment, Allah (swt), the Mighty and Majestic, leaves him to himself."
en.bab-ul-qaim-publications.text:
Hadith.3228 - Al-Sakuni narrated with his chain of transmission that Commander of the Faithful Imam Ali ibn Abi Talib (as) said:
"The hand of Allah (swt) hovers with mercy above the head of the judge. But if he deviates in judgment, Allah (swt), the Mighty and Majestic, leaves him to himself."
